name: lens-designer
description: WYSIWYG component designer for Snapchat Spectacles AR UI. Designer in the browser; truth-test renders in a sandboxed Lens Studio.

scripts.app: pnpm -C web build && pnpm -C desktop build && pnpm -C desktop dev
scripts.app:package: pnpm -C web build && pnpm -C desktop build && pnpm -C desktop package
